# TOC File Format

`<folder>_toc.md` files are fully generated. Never edit them.

## Example

```markdown
<!-- Auto-generated by build_toc.sh — edit CONTEXT.md instead -->

# CONTEXT

> Architecture and coding conventions

## Subfolders

| Folder | Description |
| ------ | ----------- |
| [coding/](coding/coding_toc.md) | Shared coding standards *(read-only)* |
| [database/](database/database_toc.md) | Schema and migration patterns |

## Files

| File | Description |
| ---- | ----------- |
| [architecture.md](architecture.md) | System components |
```

## Sections

| Section | When present |
|---------|--------------|
| Header comment | Always |
| Folder name heading | Always |
| Description blockquote | When description is set |
| Subfolders | Always (table or "_No subfolders._") |
| Files | Always (table or "_No files._") |

## Excluded from file listing

The description file, the `_toc.md` itself, and any underscore/dot-prefixed names.
